Title: Establishes a time-limited blue ribbon panel on co-occurring disorders to develop a statewide framework for the integration of mental health and substance use services
Summary: Establishes a time-limited blue ribbon panel on co-occurring disorders to develop a statewide framework for the integration of mental health and substance use services.
ActClause: AN ACT to establish a time-limited blue ribbon panel on co-occurring disorders to develop a statewide framework for the integration of mental health and substance use services
